records.ety: [ Chin. li kin; li the thousandth part of a tael + kin money.]

defs: A Chinese provincial tax levied at many inland stations upon imports or articles in transit.
quotes: “Likin,” which used to be regarded as illegal, as one of the many, “squeezes” imposed by the mandarins, is, in Jamieson's opinion, just as legal as any other form of taxation.
